channel.title: Decision Science Digest | Maohua Nie
channel.description: A bi-weekly curated reading list of interesting new papers on decision making, risk, behavioral economics, and cognitive modeling — handpicked from 25+ leading journals.

item.title: Research Digest · 2026-03-16 → 2026-03-31 (7 papers)
item.description: This digest features 7 curated new papers on decision making, behavioral economics, and cognitive modeling. Read the full digest at https://maohuanie.com/research-digest/2026-04-01.html
